title: 1.8 creative tab
description:
This pack reworks the creative gui to the latest but only with 1.8.9 items
Useful if you play Housing or Buildbattle in Hypixel with newest vesion for example
body:
This pack reworks the creative gui to the latest but only with 1.8.9 items Useful if you play Housing or Buildbattle in Hypixel for example

Its also modify the texture of the stone_slab to the smooth_stone_slab

This resource pack need the MoreCreativeTabs to work (https://modrinth.com/mod/morecreativetabs)
